title: Verify approved batch commit through LEDGER
preconditions: A compatible public LEDGER test contract, approved and unapproved manifests, exact duplicates, and stable failure responses are available.
steps: Commit each manifest through the public process boundary, inspect calls and durable outcomes, and round-trip returned canonical references.
expected: Every acceptance criterion of FR-INGEST-APPROVED-BATCH-COMMIT holds; only frozen accepted candidates reach the public LEDGER operation and unsafe failure stops continuation.
